description: M16: Polish & Cross-Cutting — universal error pattern, idle detection/disconnect/recovery, i18n completion, accessibility pass, prefers-reduced-motion, auto-scroll, production auth

userStories.title: Universal Error Pattern — Enhanced Error Toast
userStories.description: As a user, I want error toasts to show 'Show Logs' and 'Retry' buttons so that I can debug issues and retry failed operations
acceptanceCriteria: Error toast displays 'Show Logs' (outline) and 'Retry' (primary) buttons
Retry button triggers the failed operation again
Retry counter increments on each retry (max from admin_parameters, default 3)
After max retries, Retry button disabled with text 'Max retries reached'
userStories.notes:
Design: component-specs.md § 11.4 Error States
Files: frontend/src/components/common/ErrorToast.tsx (enhance), frontend/src/hooks/useErrorHandler.ts (new)
Gotchas: Max retries from admin_parameters.max_retry_attempts (default 3)

userStories.title: Error Log Modal — Technical Details
userStories.description: As a user, I want the error log modal to show console logs, network responses, technical details, and support contact
acceptanceCriteria: Modal shows: console log (last 20 errors), network response (HTTP status, body), technical details (error code, timestamp, user agent, URL)
Support contact: 'If this issue persists, contact support at support@commerzreal.de'
userStories.notes:
Design: component-specs.md § 11.4 Error States
Files: frontend/src/components/common/ErrorLogModal.tsx (enhance), frontend/src/utils/errorLogger.ts (new)
Gotchas: Console log capture needs window.console.error monkey-patch or ErrorBoundary

components: ErrorLogModal — needs console log + network response + tech details + support contact
test_cases: T-14.1.02 | Unit | Show Logs opens modal with details

userStories.title: Idle Detection — Mouse Inactivity & Tab Visibility
userStories.description: As a system, I want to detect user idle state after configurable inactivity for server resource management
acceptanceCriteria: User marked idle after no mouse movement for idle_timeout seconds (default: 300)
Tab visibility change triggers idle immediately
Idle triggers presence_update WebSocket message with state='idle'
Presence indicator grey/dimmed for idle users
User can still receive updates while idle
userStories.notes:
Design: component-specs.md § 9.2 Stacked Avatars — idle avatar opacity-50 + grayscale
Files: frontend/src/hooks/useIdleDetection.ts (new), frontend/src/store/slices/presenceSlice.ts, services/gateway/apps/websocket/consumers.py
Gotchas: Mouse movement throttled (500ms). Page Visibility API for tab blur

test_cases: T-15.1.02 | Unit | Tab blur triggers idle

userStories.title: Connection Disconnect on Prolonged Idle
userStories.description: As a system, I want to close connections after prolonged idle to free server resources
acceptanceCriteria: After idle for idle_disconnect seconds (default: 120), server closes WebSocket
Offline banner: 'Connection closed due to inactivity. Move your mouse to reconnect.'
userStories.notes:
Design: component-specs.md § 11.5 Banners
Files: services/gateway/apps/websocket/consumers.py (idle timeout timer), frontend/src/components/common/OfflineBanner.tsx
Gotchas: Server idle timer resets on any WebSocket message. Use asyncio timeout

userStories.title: Return from Idle — Reconnection & State Sync
userStories.description: As a user, I want to automatically reconnect when I return from idle for seamless resumption
acceptanceCriteria: Mouse movement during idle clears idle flag and triggers reconnection
On reconnect: banner disappears, chat/board unlock, presence returns to 'online'
State sync: fetch latest idea state via REST
userStories.notes:
Files: frontend/src/hooks/useIdleDetection.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useIdeaSync.ts (new)
Gotchas: State sync must be idempotent. Use TanStack Query invalidateQueries

userStories.title: i18n Completion — Full Coverage
userStories.description: As a user, I want all user-facing text in German and English for my preferred language
acceptanceCriteria: All UI labels, buttons, navigation, tooltips, errors translated to de + en
All keys in both de.json and en.json
userStories.notes:
Files: frontend/src/i18n/locales/{de,en}.json (add keys), services/notification/templates/ (email templates)
Gotchas: Email templates in Python. Timeline events translated in frontend

test_cases: T-16.1.01 | Unit | All text both langs

userStories.title: Accessibility Pass — Keyboard Navigation & Focus
userStories.description: As a keyboard user, I want all interactive elements keyboard-accessible with visible focus indicators
acceptanceCriteria: Visible focus (gold ring: ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2)
userStories.notes:
Design: component-specs.md § 1.3 Button States
Files: frontend/src/components/ui/*.tsx (focus styles), frontend/src/components/common/SkipLink.tsx
Gotchas: shadcn/ui has keyboard support via Radix. Add Tailwind focus classes

userStories.title: Accessibility Pass — Screen Reader Labels
userStories.description: As a screen reader user, I want all interactive elements to have appropriate labels
acceptanceCriteria: Form inputs have labels or aria-label
userStories.notes:
Design: component-specs.md § 1.4 Icon Buttons
Files: frontend/src/components/**/*.tsx (aria-label, aria-describedby, aria-live)
Gotchas: aria-live='polite' for status, aria-live='assertive' for errors

userStories.title: Prefers-Reduced-Motion Support
userStories.description: As a user who prefers reduced motion, I want animations to respect my system preference
acceptanceCriteria: Static alternatives: skeleton loaders static, AI processing static text
Title animation disabled when reduced motion preferred
Board AI indicator pulse disabled when reduced motion preferred
userStories.notes:
Design: component-specs.md § 5.4 AI Processing Indicator
Files: frontend/src/components/**/*.tsx (useReducedMotion), frontend/src/app/globals.css (@media rules)
Gotchas: framer-motion has useReducedMotion hook. CSS uses Tailwind motion-reduce: variant

userStories.title: Production Auth — MSAL.js Integration
userStories.description: As a production user, I want to authenticate with Azure AD for authorized access
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated users redirected to Azure AD
Access token in REST requests (Authorization: Bearer)
If refresh fails, redirect to login
Double-gate: auth bypass only when DEBUG=True
userStories.notes:
Architecture: tech-stack.md § Authentication Flow Design
Files: frontend/src/app/providers.tsx (MsalProvider), frontend/src/config/msalConfig.ts (new), services/gateway/middleware/azure_ad_auth.py (new), services/gateway/apps/websocket/middleware.py
Gotchas: MSAL config needs Azure AD tenant ID, client ID from .env. Token validation caches JWKS keys
